name: MERCER INTERNATIONAL INC.
summary: Mercer International Inc. (MERC) is a global forest products company operating in the pulp and solid wood industries. The company produces northern bleached softwood kraft (NBSK) pulp, lumber, and related wood products. It also generates and sells green energy and chemicals as byproducts of its pulp manufacturing operations. Mercer operates mills primarily in Germany and Canada, serving markets across Europe, North America, and Asia.

products.name: Northern Bleached Softwood Kraft (NBSK) Pulp
products.description: Bleached softwood kraft pulp produced at company mills for sale in global markets.

products.name: Lumber and Solid Wood Products
products.description: Lumber and other solid wood products produced at company sawmill operations.

products.name: Green Energy
products.description: Renewable energy generated as a byproduct of pulp manufacturing operations and sold externally.

products.name: Chemicals
products.description: Chemical byproducts generated during pulp production and sold as additional revenue streams.
